description: A sequence of actions or gestures regularly followed by a person or group, often imbued with symbolic value. It is a practice of mindful, repeated action.
rationale: A composition of the established roots 'the' (thoughtful, deliberate) and 'la' (path, flow). The word's structure literally means 'a deliberate path,' defining a ritual as a series of intentional, repeated actions—a path that is walked with mindfulness. It is simpler and more personal than 'thorea' (ceremony).
